content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Project On Government Oversight: Fact Checker/Editor Anywhere in the World Florida All Other Remote Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Washington DC <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://pogo.org">http://pogo.org</a> </p> <p><strong>Responsibilities include:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Manage multiple project simultaneously, often under tight deadlines.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Review, assess, and provide feedback to ensure POGO’s written projects are accurate, fair, clear, and nonpartisan.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Assist as needed with proofreading.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Assist as needed with maintaining POGO’s style guide.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Collaborate with POGO’s writers to help their ideas and stories succeed.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Brainstorm, develop, and implement ways to ensure that POGO’s written products reflect the organization’s commitment to justice, equity, diversity and inclusion.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Maintain close collaboration and communication with other editorial team members.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Maintain understanding of best practices in fact checking and editing through regular professional development.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications include:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Four years of experience fact checking or researching for a newsroom, nonprofit, or other content-producing organization</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Demonstrated experience editing a range of different content types and the ability to fact check a range of work including emails, op-eds, testimony, reports, breaking news investigations.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Knowledge of AP style</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Commitment to accuracy, nonpartisanship, and attention to detail.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Demonstrated commitment to working in a collaborative, respectful manner demonstrating a strong commitment to POGO’s justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion principles.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Demonstrated track record of taking initiative to solve problems and adapt to changing circumstances.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Ability to manage confidential information with discretion.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>(+) Familiarity with US federal government policy, structure, and operations preferred.</li> </ul> <ul> <li>(+) Familiarity with general principles and best practices for public sector transparency and accountability preferred.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Compensation, benefits, and other information:</strong></p> <p>This position is eligible for remote work from anywhere within the United States provided you are available during POGO’s work hours of 9AM-6PM EST.</p> <p>This is a full time, nonexempt, at will position. This position is grant funded for a period of one year and continued employment is contingent upon the receipt of direct grant funds. This position includes the listed benefits:</p> <ul> <li>Competitive nonprofit salary commensurate with experience in the range of 68K-80K</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Health, dental and vision insurance</li> </ul> <ul> <li>403(b) employee investment plan available, with employer contribution once eligible</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Life insurance, short-term and long-term disability coverage</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Paid holiday, vacation, and sick leave</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To Apply:&nbsp;</strong>Submit a cover letter and resume. No phone calls please.</p> <p><strong>Application Deadline:&nbsp;</strong><strong>Aug 5th, 2026</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p> POGO is committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce and provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, or genetics. We encourage all interested and qualified individuals to apply.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/project-on-government-oversight-fact-checker-editor">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/project-on-government-oversight-fact-checker-editor</a></p> Wed, 22 Jul 2026 15:22:44 +0000 Fri, 21 Aug 2026 15:22:44 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/project-on-government-oversight-fact-checker-editor https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/project-on-government-oversight-fact-checker-editor Ameris Bank: Equipment Finance Regional Sales Manager - San Ramon Sales California CMS Development, CRM, Hardware, Productivity Software, Software Support, SaaS, Hardware/Software Support, CRM Systems, CRM Integration, and HR Software Management and Finance Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5946/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> CA-CostaMesa-AntonBlvd <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://amerisbank.com">http://amerisbank.com</a> </p> <div><p><b>Ameris Bank</b> is a purpose-driven company, dedicated to bringing financial peace of mind to communities, one person at a time. Whether a customer wants to grow their business, buy a home, or feel confident in their retirement plan, they have a partner in Ameris Bank. We serve customers in our locations across the Southeast, Mid-Atlantic and nationwide through our extensive digital offerings and mobile app.</p><p><br>Delivering financial peace of mind starts with a team that values integrity and rewards ingenuity. At Ameris, you’ll find teammates who are inclusive, collaborative problem-solvers who go the extra mile to support one another and to meet every customer’s needs. When teammates are empowered and bring their diverse perspectives to the table, we create the best possible outcomes for our customers. At Ameris, we know that a growth mindset is key for high performance and fosters an environment that prioritizes continuous improvement. Teammates have access to Employee Resource Groups that serve as advocates and <a href="https://www.amerisbank.com/About/Why-Ameris/Our-Purpose">purpose</a> and how you can bring it to life as an Ameris Bank teammate.</p><p></p><p></p><p>Responsible for developing new business and further expanding relationships with end user accounts and current customers. Supports the sales team in various ways by assisting with training and helping develop new salespeople, as needed.</p><p></p><p>Essential Functions, Duties, and Responsibilities:<br>· Prospect and develop new and existing vendor and or end user customer relationships<br>· Drive originations and or gross margin to stated objectives<br>· Collects and analyzes information regarding customer's income, assets, investments, or debts<br>· Provides appropriate financing solutions which address customers’ individual needs after assessment of customer’s experience, assets, debt, and experience with financing products<br>· Works wit
